base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of anko_friender — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Anko (octopus sub-boss) + Friender (mecha-dog mini-boss). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
